blended.narrative: Big Sky is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 4,669 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 7 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Friday: 2.2" of snow, highs of 38°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: 7.2" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is building — up 6" over the past week. Current depth: 60".
